revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = People of the Sengoku period | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | bodyclass = hlist | title = Prominent people of the [[Sengoku period|Sengoku]] and [[Azuchi–Momoyama period|Azuchi–Momoyama]] periods | group1 = [[Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] | list1 = * [[Emperor Go-Kashiwabara|Go-Kashiwabara]] * [[Emperor Go-Nara|Go-Nara]] * [[Emperor Ōgimachi|Ōgimachi]] * [[Emperor Go-Yōzei|Go-Yōzei]] | group2 = Three major ''[[daimyō]]'' | list2 = * [[Oda Nobunaga]] * [[Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] * [[Tokugawa Ieyasu]] | group3 = ''[[Shōgun]]'' | list3 = * [[Ashikaga Yoshiharu]] * [[Ashikaga Yoshiteru]] * [[Ashikaga Yoshihide]] * [[Ashikaga Yoshiaki]] * [[Tokugawa Hidetada]] | group4 = Other ''[[List of daimyōs from the Sengoku period|daimyō]]'' | list4 = * [[Amago Tsunehisa]] * [[Amago Haruhisa]] * [[Asakura Yoshikage]] * [[Ashina Moriuji]] * [[Akechi Mitsuhide]] * [[Azai Nagamasa]] * [[Chōsokabe Motochika]] * [[Date Terumune]] * [[Date Masamune]] * [[Hatakeyama Yoshitaka]] * [[Honda Tadakatsu]] * [[Hōjō Sōun]] * [[Hōjō Ujimasa]] * [[Hōjō Ujiyasu]] * [[Ii Naomasa]] * [[Imagawa Yoshimoto]] * [[Imagawa Ujizane]] * [[Isshiki Yoshimichi]] * [[Itō Yoshisuke]] * [[Kitabatake Tomonori]] * [[Kuroda Nagamasa]] * [[Matsunaga Hisahide]] * [[Miyoshi Nagayoshi]] * [[Mogami Yoshiaki]] * [[Mōri Motonari]] * [[Ōuchi Yoshitaka]] * [[Ōuchi Yoshinaga]] * [[Ōtomo Sōrin]] * [[Rokkaku Yoshikata]] * [[Ryūzōji Takanobu]] * [[Saitō Dōsan]] * [[Saitō Yoshitatsu]] * [[Sakai Tadatsugu]] * [[Sakakibara Yasumasa]] * [[Satomi Yoshitaka]] * [[Sanada Yukitaka]] * [[Sanada Masayuki]] * [[Sanada Nobuyuki]] * [[Satake Yoshishige]] * [[Sagara Yoshihi]] * [[Shimazu Yoshihisa]] * [[Shimazu Yoshihiro]] * [[Tachibana Dōsetsu]] * [[Takeda Nobutora]] * [[Takeda Shingen]] * [[Tōdō Takatora]] * [[Uesugi Kagekatsu]] * [[Uesugi Kenshin]] * [[Uesugi Norimasa]] * [[Ukita Naoie]] * [[Uragami Munekage]] * [[Yamana Toyokuni]] * [[Yamana Suketoyo]] | group6 = [[Kenjutsu|Swordsmen]] | list6 = * [[Marume Nagayoshi]] * [[Hikita Bungorō]] * [[Kamiizumi Nobutsuna]] * [[Miyamoto Musashi]] * [[Mizuno Katsushige]] * [[Sasaki Kojirō]] * [[Tadashima Akiyama]] * [[Tsukahara Bokuden]] * [[Tsutsumi Hōzan]] * [[Yagyū Munenori]] * [[Yagyū Munetoshi]] * [[Shinmen Munisai]] * [[Itō Ittōsai]] | group7= [[Adviser]]s and [[strategist]]s | list7 = * [[Kobayakawa Takakage]] * [[Kuroda Yoshitaka]] * [[Naoe Kanetsugu]] * [[Takenaka Shigeharu]] * [[Usami Sadamitsu]] * [[Yamamoto Kansuke (general)|Yamamoto Kansuke]] | group8 = {{longitem|[[Ninja]], rogues and
mercenaries}} | list8 = * [[Mochizuki Chiyome]] * [[Fūma Kotarō]] * [[Hatsume no Tsubone]] * [[Hattori Hanzō]] * [[Ishikawa Goemon]] * [[Katō Danzō]] * [[Kirigakure Saizō|Kirigakure Shikaemon]] * [[Sarutobi Sasuke|Kōzuki Sasuke]] * [[Nakamura (bandit)|Nakamura Chōbei]] * [[Ohama Kagetaka]] * [[Sugitani Zenjūbō]] * [[Suzuki Magoichi|Saika Magoichi]] ** [[Suzuki Shigeoki|Suzuki Sadayu]] ** [[Suzuki Shigehide]] ** [[Suzuki Magoichi|Suzuki Shigetomo]] * [[Suzuki Magoroku]] * [[Tateoka Doshun|Igasaki Dōshun]] * [[Umemura Sawano]] | group9 = {{longitem|[[Monk]]s and other
religious figures}} | list9 = * [[Ankokuji Ekei]] * [[Kōsa|Hongan-ji Kennyo]] * [[Hon'inbō Sansa]] * [[Ishin Sūden]] * [[Jion (monk)|Jion]] * [[Koji Kashin]] * [[Tenkai|Nankōbō Tenkai]] * [[Rennyo]] * [[Sessai Chōrō]] * [[Shimozuma Chūkō]] * [[Shimotsuma Rairen]] * [[Shimozuma Rairyū]] * [[Takuan Sōhō]] | group10 = [[List of female castellans in Japan|Female castellans]] | list10 = * [[Ashikaga Ujinohime|Ashikaga Ujihime]] * [[Yodo-dono|Chacha]] * [[Miyohime]] * [[Munakata Saikaku]] * [[Nene (aristocrat)|Nene]] * [[Onamihime]] * [[Otazu no kata|Otazu no Kata]] * [[Lady Otsuya|Otsuya no Kata]] * [[Seishin-ni]] * [[Tachibana Ginchiyo]] | group11 = [[Onna-musha|Female warriors]] | list11 = * [[Akai Teruko]] * [[Fujishiro Gozen]] * [[Lady Ichikawa|Ichikawa no Tsubone]] * [[Ikeda Sen]] * [[Kaihime]] * [[Kamehime]] * [[Katakura Kita]] * [[Katō Tsune]] * [[Komatsuhime]] * [[Kushihashi Teru]] * [[Maeda Matsu]] * [[Myōki]] * [[Myorin|Myōrin]] * [[Numata Jakō]] * [[Tsuruhime|Ōhōri Tsuruhime]] * [[Okaji no Kata]] * [[Okyō|Okyō no Kata]] * [[Omasa]] * [[Oni Gozen]] * [[Shigashi]] * [[Lady Shirai|Shirai no Tsubone]] * [[Ueno Tsuruhime]] * [[Yuki no Kata]] | group12 = Other women | list12 = * [[Lady Acha]] * [[Akohime]] * [[Asahi no kata|Asahihime]] * [[Lady Chaa]] * [[Chikurin-in]] * [[Gōhime]] * [[Lady Goryū]] * [[Tsuchida Gozen|Dota Gozen]] * [[Tokuhime (1559–1636)|Gotokuhime]] * [[Tsumaki Hiroko]] * [[Lady Hayakawa]] * [[Hosokawa Gracia]] * [[Irohahime]] * [[Izumo no Okuni]] * [[Jukei-ni]] * [[Shimazu Kameju]] * [[Lady Kasuga]] * [[Keigin-ni]] * [[Kitsuno]] * [[Konoe Sakiko]] * [[Kōzōsu]] * [[Kyōgoku Maria]] * [[Kyōgoku Tatsuko]] * [[Kyōun'in]] * [[Matsuhime]] * [[Megohime]] * [[Lady Myōkyū]] * [[Naitō Julia]] * [[Nōhime]] * [[Odai no Kata]] * [[Oeyo]] * [[Oichi]] * [[Oinu]] * [[Ohatsu]] * [[Ōkurakyō no Tsubone|Lady Ōkurakyo]] * [[Ōmandokoro]] * [[Ono Otsū]] * [[Ōtomo-Nata Jezebel]] * [[Rikei]] * [[Lady Saigō]] * [[Lady Sanjō]] * [[Seien-in]] * [[Seikōin]] * [[Senhime]] * [[Aya-Gozen|Sentōin]] * [[Tobai-in]] * [[Toyotomi Sadako]] * [[Tomo (Toyotomi)|Tomo]] * [[Lady Toida]] * [[Tokuhime (1565–1615)|Tokuhime]] * [[Tōshōin]] * [[Lady Tsukiyama]] * [[Yamauchi Chiyo]] * [[Yoshihime]] * [[Yoshihiro Kikuhime]] | group13 = Foreign people in Japan | list13 = * [[Alessandro Valignano]] * [[Francis Xavier]] * [[Gaspar Coelho]] * [[Jacob Quaeckernaeck]] * [[Jan Joosten van Lodensteijn]] * [[Julia Ota]] * [[Luís Fróis]] * Soga Seikan * [[Wakita Naokata]] * [[Wang Zhi (pirate)|Wang Zhi]] * [[William Adams (pilot)|William Adams]] * [[Yasuke]] | group14 = See also | list14 = * [[List of samurai from the Sengoku period]] }} {{collapsible option}} {{check completeness of transclusions}} [[Category:Japan history navigational boxes]]

{{Navbox | name = People of the Sengoku period | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | bodyclass = hlist | title = Prominent people of the [[Sengoku period|Sengoku]] and [[Azuchi–Momoyama period|Azuchi–Momoyama]] periods | group1 = [[Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] | list1 = * [[Emperor Go-Kashiwabara|Go-Kashiwabara]] * [[Emperor Go-Nara|Go-Nara]] * [[Emperor Ōgimachi|Ōgimachi]] * [[Emperor Go-Yōzei|Go-Yōzei]] | group2 = Three major ''[[daimyō]]'' | list2 = * [[Oda Nobunaga]] * [[Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] * [[Tokugawa Ieyasu]] | group3 = ''[[Shōgun]]'' | list3 = * [[Ashikaga Yoshiharu]] * [[Ashikaga Yoshiteru]] * [[Ashikaga Yoshihide]] * [[Ashikaga Yoshiaki]] * [[Tokugawa Hidetada]] | group4 = Other ''[[List of daimyōs from the Sengoku period|daimyō]]'' | list4 = * [[Amago Tsunehisa]] * [[Amago Haruhisa]] * [[Asakura Yoshikage]] * [[Ashina Moriuji]] * [[Akechi Mitsuhide]] * [[Azai Nagamasa]] * [[Chōsokabe Motochika]] * [[Date Terumune]] * [[Date Masamune]] * [[Hatakeyama Yoshitaka]] * [[Honda Tadakatsu]] * [[Hōjō Sōun]] * [[Hōjō Ujimasa]] * [[Hōjō Ujiyasu]] * [[Ii Naomasa]] * [[Imagawa Yoshimoto]] * [[Imagawa Ujizane]] * [[Isshiki Yoshimichi]] * [[Itō Yoshisuke]] * [[Kitabatake Tomonori]] * [[Kuroda Nagamasa]] * [[Matsunaga Hisahide]] * [[Miyoshi Nagayoshi]] * [[Mogami Yoshiaki]] * [[Mōri Motonari]] * [[Ōuchi Yoshitaka]] * [[Ōuchi Yoshinaga]] * [[Ōtomo Sōrin]] * [[Rokkaku Yoshikata]] * [[Ryūzōji Takanobu]] * [[Saitō Dōsan]] * [[Saitō Yoshitatsu]] * [[Sakai Tadatsugu]] * [[Sakakibara Yasumasa]] * [[Satomi Yoshitaka]] * [[Sanada Yukitaka]] * [[Sanada Masayuki]] * [[Sanada Nobuyuki]] * [[Satake Yoshishige]] * [[Sagara Yoshihi]] * [[Shimazu Yoshihisa]] * [[Shimazu Yoshihiro]] * [[Tachibana Dōsetsu]] * [[Takeda Nobutora]] * [[Takeda Shingen]] * [[Tōdō Takatora]] * [[Uesugi Kagekatsu]] * [[Uesugi Kenshin]] * [[Uesugi Norimasa]] * [[Ukita Naoie]] * [[Uragami Munekage]] * [[Yamana Toyokuni]] * [[Yamana Suketoyo]] | group6 = [[Kenjutsu|Swordsmen]] | list6 = * [[Marume Nagayoshi]] * [[Hikita Bungorō]] * [[Kamiizumi Nobutsuna]] * [[Miyamoto Musashi]] * [[Mizuno Katsushige]] * [[Sasaki Kojirō]] * [[Tadashima Akiyama]] * [[Tsukahara Bokuden]] * [[Tsutsumi Hōzan]] * [[Yagyū Munenori]] * [[Yagyū Munetoshi]] * [[Shinmen Munisai]] * [[Itō Ittōsai]] | group7= [[Adviser]]s and [[strategist]]s | list7 = * [[Kobayakawa Takakage]] * [[Kuroda Yoshitaka]] * [[Naoe Kanetsugu]] * [[Takenaka Shigeharu]] * [[Usami Sadamitsu]] * [[Yamamoto Kansuke (general)|Yamamoto Kansuke]] | group8 = {{longitem|[[Ninja]], rogues and
mercenaries}} | list8 = * [[Mochizuki Chiyome]] * [[Fūma Kotarō]] * [[Hatsume no Tsubone]] * [[Hattori Hanzō]] * [[Ishikawa Goemon]] * [[Katō Danzō]] * [[Kirigakure Saizō|Kirigakure Shikaemon]] * [[Sarutobi Sasuke|Kōzuki Sasuke]] * [[Nakamura (bandit)|Nakamura Chōbei]] * [[Ohama Kagetaka]] * [[Sugitani Zenjūbō]] * [[Suzuki Magoichi|Saika Magoichi]] ** [[Suzuki Shigeoki|Suzuki Sadayu]] ** [[Suzuki Shigehide]] ** [[Suzuki Magoichi|Suzuki Shigetomo]] * [[Suzuki Magoroku]] * [[Tateoka Doshun|Igasaki Dōshun]] * [[Umemura Sawano]] | group9 = {{longitem|[[Monk]]s and other
religious figures}} | list9 = * [[Ankokuji Ekei]] * [[Kōsa|Hongan-ji Kennyo]] * [[Hon'inbō Sansa]] * [[Ishin Sūden]] * [[Jion (monk)|Jion]] * [[Koji Kashin]] * [[Tenkai|Nankōbō Tenkai]] * [[Rennyo]] * [[Sessai Chōrō]] * [[Shimozuma Chūkō]] * [[Shimotsuma Rairen]] * [[Shimozuma Rairyū]] * [[Takuan Sōhō]] | group10 = [[List of female castellans in Japan|Female castellans]] | list10 = * [[Ashikaga Ujinohime|Ashikaga Ujihime]] * [[Yodo-dono|Chacha]] * [[Miyohime]] * [[Munakata Saikaku]] * [[Nene (aristocrat)|Nene]] * [[Onamihime]] * [[Otazu no kata|Otazu no Kata]] * [[Lady Otsuya|Otsuya no Kata]] * [[Seishin-ni]] * [[Tachibana Ginchiyo]] | group11 = [[Onna-musha|Female warriors]] | list11 = * [[Akai Teruko]] * [[Fujishiro Gozen]] * [[Lady Ichikawa|Ichikawa no Tsubone]] * [[Ikeda Sen]] * [[Kaihime]] * [[Kamehime]] * [[Katakura Kita]] * [[Katō Tsune]] * [[Komatsuhime]] * [[Kushihashi Teru]] * [[Maeda Matsu]] * [[Myōki]] * [[Myorin|Myōrin]] * [[Numata Jakō]] * [[Tsuruhime|Ōhōri Tsuruhime]] * [[Okaji no Kata]] * [[Okyō|Okyō no Kata]] * [[Omasa]] * [[Oni Gozen]] * [[Shigashi]] * [[Lady Shirai|Shirai no Tsubone]] * [[Ueno Tsuruhime]] * [[Yuki no Kata]] | group12 = Other women | list12 = * [[Lady Acha]] * [[Akohime]] * [[Asahi no kata|Asahihime]] * [[Lady Chaa]] * [[Chikurin-in]] * [[Gōhime]] * [[Lady Goryū]] * [[Tsuchida Gozen|Dota Gozen]] * [[Tokuhime (1559–1636)|Gotokuhime]] * [[Tsumaki Hiroko]] * [[Lady Hayakawa]] * [[Hosokawa Gracia]] * [[Irohahime]] * [[Izumo no Okuni]] * [[Jukei-ni]] * [[Shimazu Kameju]] * [[Lady Kasuga]] * [[Keigin-ni]] * [[Jacob Quaeckernaeck]] * [[Jan Joosten van Lodensteijn]] * [[Julia Ota]] * [[Luís Fróis]] * Soga Seikan * [[Wakita Naokata]] * [[Wang Zhi (pirate)|Wang Zhi]] * [[William Adams (pilot)|William Adams]] boxes]]

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:Template:People of the Sengoku period]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]]
[[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category::People of the Sengoku period]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]]
[[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:People of the Sengoku period]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]]

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: remove deleted category People of the Sengoku period
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23525408989|commit triggered pipeline]]
